title: doellingeria umbellata var. pubens
intro: Doellingeria umbellata var. pubens, also known as pubescent flat-topped white aster, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are believed to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Doellingeria umbellata var. pubens is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
